planned_changes: Insert a labeled final decision table with one row per asset (A, B, C) and columns: Privilege, Exposure, Findings, Data, DerivedPriority, Reason. Fill each cell with the exact packet-derived value and a one-line reason.

Add a reproducible validation checklist: a short table of checks (e.g., 'Critical rule match?', 'Findings > 5?') showing the exact packet value used and the expected outcome, plus example assertions or commands that could be run to reproduce checks.
Complete and expand the Uncertainty & Sensitivity section so it explicitly discusses tie-break behavior, threshold sensitivity, and any ordering edge-cases (e.g., if findings were equal).
Add a revision summary at the top of the document noting what changed and why (to speed re-review).
Re-save/re-materialize the artifact and run the deterministic precheck; confirm the artifact preview is complete and attach or reference the deterministic precheck output in the artifact metadata.

metadata_json.revision_goal: The baseline submission meets the artifact contract and is traceable to the embedded packet: packet rows are cited, intermediate calculations are shown, and a remediation order with evidence tie-backs is provided. Partial credit (0.75) was awarded due to a truncated artifact preview and the absence (in the visible preview) of a clearly labeled, structured final decision table and a concise, reproducible validation checklist. Fixing those minor gaps and ensuring the full artifact is materialized will allow full credit.
